headline: A Look At ONEOK (OKE) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Why ONEOK is on investors’ radar today ONEOK (OKE) has caught investor attention after its recent share price move, with the stock showing a 1 day return of 1.3% and a month gain of 3.2% heading into Thursday, 12 Mar 2026. See our latest analysis for ONEOK. Looking beyond today’s move, ONEOK’s recent momentum is reflected in a 16.5% 90 day share price return and a 15.4% year to date share price return. headline: Is ONEOK (OKE) Pricing Fair After Recent Midstream Sector Sentiment Shift?
summary: If you are wondering whether ONEOK at around US$85.76 is offering good value or asking too much, you are in the right place to size up what the current price might be implying. The stock price moves help frame that question, with a 1.2% return over the last 7 days, 3.2% over 30 days, 15.4% year to date and a 2.6% decline over the past year, alongside longer term returns of 64.8% over 3 years and 126.1% over 5 years. Recent news around ONEOK has focused on its role as a large US midstream...
